atlantis.log_game_started: The game has begun. You move first.
atlantis.log_forces_give_cards: Higher Powers deal {player} {n} cards from the deck onto the table
atlantis.log_forces_take: ✨ Higher Powers take all {n} cards back into the common deck. The turn passes on.
atlantis.log_player_takes: {player} takes {n} cards — the next move is theirs
atlantis.others_watch: The others just watch and add no more cards
atlantis.your_cards_no_more: Your cards are no longer added. Watch the dispute.
atlantis.end_tie_sub: Forces are equal — it will be decided in the next game
atlantis.no_cards_in_hand: You have no cards in hand
atlantis.which_card_swap: Which of your cards to swap?
atlantis.rival_gives_random: The rival will give a random one in return
atlantis.rules_goal_text: collect more cards in hand than your rival.
atlantis.rules_deck_3: At the start everyone has 4 cards
atlantis.rules_flow_1: 1. The mover picks the battle parameter (Magic / Life / Power / Total)
atlantis.rules_flow_2: 2. All three lay a card face down
atlantis.rules_flow_3: 3. You press «Flip» — the cards are revealed
atlantis.rules_flow_4: 4. Whoever has the higher value of the chosen parameter takes all cards from the table
atlantis.rules_flow_5: 5. The right to the next move passes to the winner of the round
atlantis.rules_might_text: Everyone lays 3 cards at once. The Total sum of all three is counted. If cards are short — the Powers deal from the deck straight onto the table.
atlantis.rules_forces_1: They don't play as a player, they only add a card to each round.
atlantis.rules_forces_2: If the Powers win — all cards from the table go back into the common deck, and the right to move passes to the other player (not the one who just moved).
atlantis.rules_tie_text: If two have the same maximum — they dispute: each lays one more card. The others only watch and add no more cards. The winner of the dispute takes all cards from the table.
atlantis.rules_exchange_text: Once per game you can swap your card for a random card of the rival.
atlantis.rules_draw_text: Between rounds the Higher Powers deal cards from the deck to everyone with fewer than 4 in hand — so all enter the new round equal.
atlantis.rules_end_text: When there aren't enough cards in the deck and in hands for the next round. The winner is whichever of the two (You or the Rival) has more cards in hand. The Higher Powers don't take part in deciding the winner.

donate.title: Thank the author
donate.sub: If YupDar resonates with you, you can support the project with any amount. It helps the Universe of DARs grow.
donate.legal:
All prices are in Russian rubles. Subscriptions renew automatically. You can cancel at any time in your account.
Learn more in our Offer and Terms of Service.

referral.share_text: If your friend's DAR differs from yours, you'll unlock it in your Treasury and earn crystals

referral.share_message: Discover YupDar — a journey to your DAR. Find your DAR by birth date and start the path of Alchemy.
referral.welcome_unlocked:
Welcome to YupDar!

Your DAR is now unlocked in the Treasury of the person who invited you. It's a special connection that begins your shared journey.

+{crystals} wisdom crystals as a welcome.
referral.welcome_existing:
Welcome to YupDar!

The person who invited you already had your DAR in their Treasury. But you bring them wisdom crystals.

+{crystals} wisdom crystals as a welcome.

landing.subtitle: Universe of DARs
landing.hero_text: Discover your unique DAR by date of birth. Receive personal Oracle messages. Unlock your potential with an AI mentor. Understand your close ones.
landing.f1_text: Original system of self-discovery. Calculation by birth date, full description of essence, power and facets of each DAR.
landing.f2_text: AI-generated daily messages based on your DAR. Daily practice, energies, advice.
landing.f3_text: 94 chapters with full descriptions of all 64 DARs. Interactive reader with themes, bookmarks and search.
landing.f4_text: A dialogue coach that helps reveal facets of your DAR. Powered by DeepSeek AI, gently guiding awareness.
landing.f5_text: Calculate DARs of your loved ones, check compatibility, get a personal book for parents about their child.
landing.f6_text: Guess the DAR among cards. Battles with the AI dragon Yupik. Leaderboards and tournaments.
landing.wanderer_desc: Start your acquaintance with the world of DARs
landing.wanderer_f4: Preview of the Book of DARs (10 chapters)
landing.book_alt_pay:
one-time purchase, lifetime access
or 500 ⭐ Telegram Stars / 44M DarAI
landing.book_desc: Only the full Book of DARs: without the other features
landing.master_alt_pay:
monthly auto-renewing subscription. Cancel anytime.
or 750 ⭐ Telegram Stars / month / 66M DarAI per month
landing.master_desc: Extended access to all main features
landing.master_f1: Everything from the «Book of DARs» plan
landing.guardian_alt_pay:
monthly auto-renewing subscription
or 1,000 ⭐ Telegram Stars / month / 88M DarAI per month
landing.guardian_desc: Extended plan for practicing Masters and facilitators
landing.guardian_f4: Advanced materials — once the Library launches

treasury.final_blessing: Thank you for this work. May what has opened up stay with you.

treasury.coaching_footer: Reflect on the questions and expand your reflection above, then send again.
